privileged_info_summary: The task seeds a Zotero library with exactly 18 papers (10 from CLASSIC_PAPERS, 8 from ML_PAPERS in seed_library.py) and applies 5 tags with the following verified associations: ML tag applied to 7 papers (Attention Is All You Need, BERT, Language Models are Few-Shot Learners, ImageNet Classification, Deep Residual Learning, Generative Adversarial Nets, Deep Learning); NLP tag applied to 3 papers (Attention Is All You Need, BERT, Language Models are Few-Shot Learners); CV tag applied to 3 papers (ImageNet Classification, Deep Residual Learning, Generative Adversarial Nets); 'info theory' tag applied to 3 papers (A Mathematical Theory of Communication, The Mathematical Theory of Communication, A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes); 'comp sci' tag applied to 4 papers (On Computable Numbers, A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs, An Unsolvable Problem of Elementary Number Theory, Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions and Their Computation by Machine). The task requires renaming these 5 tags to hyphenated lowercase equivalents: ML→machine-learning, NLP→natural-language-processing, CV→computer-vision, info theory→information-theory, comp sci→computer-science.
